name: The Orville
description:
Needed an Orville bot, if anyone wants to add anything, has any suggestions, or just if your chat worked please let me know! This is the first multiple bot I've done that’s more than 2 people.

(Update! All the main cast, alien species (even the ones that don’t have much info on them), history and culture of said species, and ways the main cast speak are in this bot, I finally found some time to binge watch The Orville again and write down notes about each thing mentioned. I’ll also either be adding a lore book to this or creating a copy of the Orville bot in case I messed up the lore book so I don’t change it up for those who enjoy it as is)

(Another update! This script and lore book stuff is incredibly overwhelming lmao 😭 I’ll try wrapping my head around a beginner tutorial)
creator: Sarah Sirena
